mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox_message(aggregate, topic, msg_key, payload, status, retries) VALUES(#{aggregate}, #{topic}, #{msgKey}, #{payload}, 'PENDING', 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id, aggregate, topic, msg_key, payload, status, retries, create_time, send_time FROM outbox_message WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE outbox_message SET status='SENT', send_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE outbox_message SET retries = retries + 1 WHERE id=#{id}
